# Leap

Determine whether a given year is a leap year.

A leap year (in the Gregorian calendar) is one that:

- is evenly divisible by 4,
- except those that are evenly divisible by 100,
- unless they are also evenly divisible by 400.

Examples: 2024 is a leap year, 2023 is not, 2000 is, 1900 is not.
